title: Rajpath Mashup
lyrics:
Veer vachano par vishvas kari, aa vishyaone hun thukravaun chun,
Berangi aa sansar tyajine, rajpathnaan range rangavaun chun...
Tane vandan lakhon lakhon, tane vandan lakhon lakhon,
Hamari bhini chhe aankhon, tane vandan lakhon lakhon...
Rajpath par janara, tene vandan amara,
Rajnandan amara, tane vandan amara,
Tane vandan amara... tene vandan amara...
Ho kalyugnan sitara, tene vandan amara,
Rajpath par janara, tene vandan amara...
Hun kaaik chun e bhamana chhe, enathi dukhvo bamana chhe,
Bas hun chun evi matra chhe, tyaan sarv svikarni yatra chhe,
Bas anand chhe anand chhe uyan, lesh matra sanklesho nahi,
Bhav bhamanoni yatraao to, ant chhe anant nahi...
Sarv svikarni sanyam yatra, sadi anant chhe vire kahi,
Bhav bhamanoni yatraao to, ant chhe anant nahi...
Swami tamaro thaine jivish, vachan aapu tamne,
Tage amara thaine rahesho, vachan aapo amne...
Viratinaan veshno je shanngar dhare,
Rajpathnaan panthno je svikar kare,
Rang sansarno, sang parivaarno.. je tyaje, je tyaje..
Veer aana dhari, bhukti aabhushine.. je saje, je saje..
Rang vairagyano, shobhe chhe tyagano,
Jene chhodyaa chhe sukho tamam,
Lakhsne aambva, mokshne pamva,
Rajpathni maandi chhe yatra,
Chhodi ne chalya re vairagi, ajabni chhe eni khubgari...
Rajpathno, vishman jay jaykar ho...
Hun maangun paramno path, mara sanyam manorath,
Mane laagi sanyamni radh, mare javun rajpath,
Guru aananaaan lai shapath, mara sanyam manorath,
Jaagi gayo... jaagi gayo re...

Veerna thaine varas, veer banvani chhe aas,
Virati vesh laine, bhalathi tarvani chhe pyas,
Satva elun jaagi gayun, marun man vairagi banyun,
Aatam maro muktipathne kyare varshe?
Rajpath kyare malashe? Rajpath kyare malashe?
Kyare malashe? Kyare malashe? Kyare malashe?
Shubham bhavah, shreyo bhavah, mangal bhavah, kalyanam bhavah
Sadhu jivankee khubsurati men, ho...
Sadhu jivankee khubsurati men,
Manado...Oss... Manado...Oss...
Manado laago re laago re virati men,
Manado laago re laago re virati men...
Malashe ogho, bhav tarak dukhkharta,
Na koi bijun, aa bhavman sukhkarta,
Haiyathi gaay badhan, ne bhina thaay badhan,
Aaje rudan sankalpo, honsheti gahe badhan,
Vandho re... vandho re... rajoharnane vandho re.. bhaav dhari aanandho re..
Diksharthi amar raho, jinashasanano jayjaykar...
Rajpathno jayjaykar...
Sanyamnaan bhaavni karone pariksha,
Sanyamnaan veshni karun hun pratiksha,
Mare to levani levani chhe diksha...
Levani levani levani chhe diksha...
Jena palan pagalathi, dharati dhabkar kare,
Ne veer prabhuno vesh dhari, sanyam shangar kare,
Devo pan sadhu jilno...
Jayjaykar kare, jayjaykar kare...
Sansarno raag todi, vitraagni rahe dhodi,
Bhuktinaan range minjaava, pivo negno virati ras,
Virati..virati..virati...virati ras..virati ras...
Raaj..raaj..raaj...rajpath..rajpath...
